'''Whip''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with extraordinary reflexes who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] in the village of [[Aurilia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was alleged to be the best [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] there. His personal hatred of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] stemmed from its ban on [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]]. Whip reasoned that, if not for the podracing ban, he would be a rich and famous racer—in his estimation, the best in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

He tasked a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual with rescuing five members of the village who went missing after the [[Sith Shadows]] attacked the village. Later he tasked the individual with retrieving the cargo from downed cargo ships that were shot down by the Shadows en route from [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. As a reward, he helped train the individual in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].

==Behind the scenes==
Whip appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
